name: chain_22kmo_service_business_built_with_just
method: $22k/mo service business built with just cold emails and DMs

stages.task: Scrape LinkedIn job postings, r/entrepreneur, r/coldemail, HN 'Ask HN: Who's hiring' for businesses matching ICP (service-hungry SMBs, 5-50 employees, pain signals). Output 50 prospects/day.
Score each prospect 1-10 using trigger event framework: recent hire (+3), product launch (+2), bad G2/Capterra review (+2), site redesign (+1), funding announcement (+2). Keep score >= 6 only.

Generate personalized cold email per qualified lead using procedural memory 6-question framework: What you do, Who for, How, Proof, Price anchor, CTA. Under 100 words. Mention specific page on their site or recent trigger. CTA = 'Worth a 10-min call this week?'
Send email via warmed SMTP (cold_outbound.py). Simultaneously queue DM on Twitter/LinkedIn via playwright MCP for top 10 leads. Log all sends to LEDGER/FREELANCE_PIPELINE_ACTIVE.csv.
